args:
set -eu
benchmark_dir=$(mktemp -d)
benchmark_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- benchmark --out "$benchmark_dir")
printf '%s' "$benchmark_out" | grep -q 'benchmark_matrix entries=4'
printf '%s' "$benchmark_out" | grep -q 'benchmark selected_backend_flashinfer_prefill'
grep -q '"benchmark_program_version":1' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
grep -q '"verification_manifest_path":"fozzy/verification_program.json"' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
grep -q '"benchmark_trace_scenario":"tests/benchmark.matrix.fozzy.json"' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
grep -q '"selected_backend_only":true' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
grep -q '"warm_start_latency_ms":' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
grep -q '"cold_unique_artifact_bytes_delta":' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
grep -q '"trace_references":' "$benchmark_dir/benchmark_matrix.json"
printf 'benchmarked\n'
